raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "SB 490 aims to improve the quality and safety of state-provided nutrition programs.",
    "SB 490 requires public institutions receiving federal reimbursement to only purchase agricultural products grown, packed, or processed in the U.S. unless imported products are significantly cheaper.",
    "The implementation of SB 490 will support California's agricultural industry by ensuring taxpayer funds are used to procure food that meets high environmental and labor standards.",
    "California's agricultural community adheres to exceptional standards to ensure food safety, reduce water use, and implement climate-friendly agricultural practices.",
    "Unionized food processing jobs provide high-quality employment and ensure that products meet stringent health and safety standards."
